validator_comment: Accuracy yes; cyber not really covered.

Useful input for prioritization, not evidence of MANAGE itself.

Relevant where shift tests expose representativeness problems.
Good for boundaries and risk context.
Indirect, unless impacts depend on explanation quality.
Can be useful if monitored over time.
Uncertainty is not the same as explainability.
Data audits help, but privacy testing is different.
Docs support the system; they are not the risk system.
Documentation records V&V evidence; it is not V&V.
